case_title: EDMAR G MINA VS. DAVID GIN

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MINA, EDMAR G AS TO DEFENDANT GIN, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MINA, EDMAR G AS TO DEFENDANT GIN, DAVID

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-06-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-06-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-06-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MINA, EDMAR G IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GIN, DAVID STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2015 - JUDGMENT.
